title: Disability Care and Rehabilitation Mission and Vision
content:
Disability Care and Rehabilitation Mission and Vision

Mission:

By integrating and assimilating the necessary knowledge, skills and values about the disabled care service of the students who will benefit from the program; The main purpose of the program is to ensure that they are competent health technicians who are practitioners and developers of aged care in public space, private and non-governmental organizations.

Vision:

By integrating and assimilating the necessary knowledge, skills and values about disabled care service; It is aimed to train specialist health technicians who have the quality of implementing and developing elderly care services in public space, private area and non-governmental organizations.
